programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a young singer in danger of losing her vocal chords find her true voice.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels try to help fulfill a dying inventor's dream of finishing his invention which uses water instead of coal as a source of energy.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must intercede when a troubled teen goes on trial for violent behavior as a result of his obsession with a video game.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When a baby dies under Dr. Mike’s care, she is sued for malpractice.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When a famous singer comes to town, Dr. Mike fears that Colleen may surrender her dream of becoming a doctor.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Prejudice comes to Colorado Springs as Dr. Mike and Sully try to help a young Latin-American woman when her husband is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is faced with the prospect of leaving Colorado Springs when Sully is offered a job surveying the new Yellowstone National Park.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help another Angel who has lost her faith find her way back to heaven.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a young singer in danger of losing her vocal chords find her true voice.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels try to help fulfill a dying inventor's dream of finishing his invention which uses water instead of coal as a source of energy.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: The Return
programme.desc: The "universal soldiers" must fight the whole army, when the military's supercomputer S.E.T.H gets out of control.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: John (Adkins, The Expendables 2) wakes up from a coma to discover his wife and daughter were slaughtered in a brutal home invasion. Rating: R

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme is Lyon Gaultier, a deserter in the French Foreign Legion who travels to the USA and enters the gory world of bare-knuckled street fighting in order to make money to save his brother's life and family.

programme.title: Death Warrant
programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude van Damme ("Bloodsport", "Cyborg") is a veteran undercover cop posing as an inmate in a dangerously corrupt state prison.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Sabatiello's y encuentra a un propietario impetuoso que está muy endeudado.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Black Pearl, un restaurante de mariscos que tiene tres propietarios, cada uno de los cuales dirige la cocina de manera diferente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ubicado en Indiana, J. Willy's Bar and Grille está muy endeudado.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por Café 36, un restaurante franco-estadounidense en Illinois.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Macomb Township, Michigan, para inspeccionar Giuseppe's.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay llega a Jack's Waterfront y está horrorizado por la falta de mariscos frescos y la falta de atención de la gerencia.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a Los Ángeles para inspeccionar Sante La Brea. Descubre a un propietario con problemas financieros que no es respetado por su personal.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Cuando el Chef Ramsay regresa a Finn McCool's, The Olde Stone Mill, The Mixing Bowl, Dillon's, Campania's y Peter's, encuentra restaurantes salvados del borde del desastre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)

programme.desc: Amy helps Lou form a connection with a new horse. A crisis at the wildlife reserve bring Georgie and Adam together. When Jack faces a deadly threat it prompts Mitch to open up about his past.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack discovers the true reason behind his friend's visit. Amy is compelled to intervene when the new Extreme Team coach pits Georgie and her teammates against each other.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An out-of-town horse clinic takes a dangerous turn for Amy, Tim and Georgie. Jack is caught in the middle when Mitch's elevated status makes Peter feel like an outsider.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío para los once Chefs restantes: hacer una pizza gourmet. Los ganadores disfrutan de hamburguesas gourmet en Santa Bárbara mientras los perdedores preparan la cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los diez Chefs restantes complazcan a una adolescente exigente que vino a Hell's Kitchen para celebrar su fiesta de cumpleaños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos have just purchased a new washing machine and despite their better judgment, agree to sell their old one to the Mertzes. The next day the old machine explodes with water and suds and the Mertzes insist that the deal is off.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that the Ricardos need a bigger apartment. She discovers that an older couple in the building just had their daughter move out and they no longer need the extra space. All she needs to do is to convince Ricky to go along with the trade.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The annual talent show for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League is going to be televised this year, and Lucy and Ethel are going to perform a duet. Everything is going well as Lucy gets Ricky to emcee the show and help her and Ethel prepare.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS finds a secret government bank account that's funding a nationwide network of vigilante justice, the team must determine who is acting as judge and jury.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Marine sergeant who was hailed as a war hero for his efforts overseas; Gibbs turns to Dr. Grace Confalone for advice after he uncharacteristically unravels and abandons his team at a crime scene investigation.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former FBI agent pleads with Gibbs to do whatever is necessary to take down drug dealers after his daughter is hospitalized from an opiate overdose; Gibbs is haunted by the personal aspects of the case and his history with vigilante justice.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ziva surprises Gibbs with a cryptic warning, prompting him to question why she remained underground for years while being presumed dead by family and friends.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team links a bizarre crime scene at Arlington National Cemetery to a string of attacks on homeless veterans; Vance orders McGee, Bishop and Torres to complete hours of evidence garage cleanup for withholding information.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a petty officer's son is found murdered, evidence suggests Kasie's lifelong best friend is guilty.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the murder of a musician in the Navy's most elite band.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team assist Ziva with "the one thing" she said she would need to take care of before returning to see her family.

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Ink Master: Angels

programme.desc: Seattle's top tattoo artists vie for a spot on Ink Master, and one artist moves on to the Angel Face Off to tattoo formerly homeless people.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Nueva York, el FBI y la policía local unieron fuerzas para combatir el ingreso constante de cocaína de Colombia por los puertos de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1990 y 1991, la policía de Chicago y el FBI estaban tras el rastro de un ladrón de bancos cuyos asaltos se estaban tornando cada vez más violentos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Para diciembre de 1985, John Gotti había asumido su lugar como el nuevo Don de la familia criminal Gambino en Nueva York con el asesinato del jefe, Paul Castellano. "Don Teflón" se sentía seguro en su posición, siempre un paso delante de la ley.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de la década de los setenta, el FBI tuvo conocimiento de que había terroristas anticastristas operando en los Estados Unidos. Pero entonces apareció un nuevo grupo, más violento y agresivo que sus predecesores.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En septiembre de 1997, un equipo de hombres cubiertos con máscaras asaltó una instalación de autos blindados en Los Ángeles, y escaparon con 18,9 millones de dólares, el mayor golpe en la historia de robos de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, agentes del FBI empezaron a investigar al magnate de las estaciones de servicio de Nueva York, Gurmeet Dhinsa, por modificar las estaciones de combustible.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Larry Horn casi se sale con la suya con el crimen perfecto: un complot de homicidio múltiple que había sido planeado y ejecutado meticulosamente. La exesposa de Horn, su hijo de ocho años y una niñera fueron asesinados de manera brutal por un homicida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la década de los ochenta, el Departamento de Policía de la Ciudad de Nueva York estaba perdiendo la batalla contra las drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Entre las guerras de cocaína en Miami a principios de 1980, tres cadáveres llevaron a un escuadrón táctico formado por varias agencias a sospechar que un grupo de policías podía estar involucrado en redadas ilegales por drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Claude Dallas vivía la vida de un vaquero. Un solitario y desconfiado de la autoridad, vivía de la tierra, practicando la caza furtiva y vendiendo pieles.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una inmigrante adolescente fue a los Estados Unidos para cumplir su sueño de convertirse en doctora. Pero un giro trágico del destino intervino cuando se convirtió en una víctima inocente del comercio de las drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando los criminales violentos atacan, el FBI contraataca: emplea cada recurso disponible y, de ser necesario, crea otros.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un depredador escurridizo estaba suelto en el rural sur de California: alguien que secuestraba mujeres del frente de sus casas a plena luz del día.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de cinco años de edad, Melissa Brannen, desapareció de una fiesta de Navidad en diciembre de 1989, el único sospechoso probable era Caleb Hughes, de 24 años.

programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. As the Island of no return battle rages on, Spirit goes one-on-one with Storm Shadow for the second weather dominator fragment. Meanwhile, in the freezing arctic battleground, both sides fight for the final fragment of the weather dominator.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. As the weather dominator device is reassembled at Cobra's Temple, it's up to the Jor team's full-scale assault on the base to prevent the world from falling into Cobra's grasp!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra seizes control of the G.I. Joe space shuttle, using the shuttle and a series of relay cubes to create a pyramid-like “zone” no vehicle or machine can function in.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Shipwreck and Snake Eyes continue to evade capture in an effort to get back to the Joe team with vital data about Cobra's control cubes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: As three of Cobra's relay cubes are activated, Cobra commander moves forward with his plans to activate the fourth and final cube in the sea of lost souls. Meanwhile, Shipwreck and Snake Eyes escape Cobra's troopers in Enterprise City.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Zartan, disguised as a notable French scientist, infiltrates the worldwide defense center on a mission to destroy the facility for Cobra. He's planted a bomb, and now the clock is ticking… can the Joe team find and defuse the bomb before it's too late?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses Tomax and Xamot's company extensive enterprises to purchase the Red Rocket food chain and use its location as a network of secret missile launching bases. But the JOE team catches on to the conspiracy.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a secret military satellite is forced out of orbit by Cobra, the Joe team races to its location before Cobra can get their hands on it. But both the Joes and Cobra find that a third party has entered the battle for the device.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: In a diabolical plan to control the world's fuel supplies, Cobra begins detonating oil tankers and pipelines by remote. But when sparks uncovers the frequency Cobra is using to destroy the tankers, the Joe team may be able to turn the tables on them!

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: On Earth, Betty and her friends are running a long distance course for gym class when Betty is called for a mission. In space, Betty arrives on her ship to discover that Sparky has dismantled it and X-5 for annual tune-ups.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: It's Halloween and The Chameleon has stolen the Sythian President's brain and decides to hide out on the most backwater planet he knows: Earth! Sparky and X-5 beam down to Earth to help Betty capture The Chameleon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn’t keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja hear of another way to learn Airjitzu - from the ghost of Sensei Yang at his haunted temple - but there’s a warning; if you are trapped in it by sunrise, you will become a ghost, too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Now that the Ninja know Airjitzu, they get briefed about how the next stage to finding the tomb is to get ‘The Sword of Sanctuary’ from Cloud Kingdom, which can only be reached from the top of the Wailing Alps.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In Cloud Kingdom, a realm where destinies are written, the Ninja must get the Sword of Sanctuary, a powerful relic that can see past the traps surrounding the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master – but tensions are high as Moro’s escape from the Cursed …

programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/85 - Heading into Game 5 of the 1985 NLCS, Ozzie Smith had just 13 career home runs and none of them were from the left side of the plate. That's why when he walked if off against the Dodgers with a homer to right field, the fans went crazy.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/27/86: In the 500th World Series Game, the Red Sox and Mets battled it out in Game 7 at Shea Stadium. The Mets scored two insurance runs in the 8th inning. The franchise took home their second championship, defeating Boston, 8-5.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/20/82: With the championship on the line, Bruce Sutter comes into the game in the 8th inning to blank the Brewers. The Cardinals captured their ninth World Series win in a dramatic Game 7 win at Busch Stadium.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/86: The Astros scored three runs in the 1st inning and took the lead deep into the 9th, until the Mets retaliated with three runs to send the game into extras.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/25/86: Astros ace Mike Scott strikes out 13 and tosses no-hitter against the Giants to lift Houston to a 2-0 victory and the National League West title.

programme.title: MST3K: Stranded In Space
programme.desc: The gang on the SoL have a gag-weapon war with the Mads and watch an unsuccessful TV pilot about an astronaut stuck on an Earth-like planet where ;perfect order; rules.

programme.title: Film Crew: Killers From Space
programme.desc: Former Mystery Science Theater 3000 crew rip apart Killers from Space.

programme.title: MST3K: First Spaceship On Venus
programme.desc: A multinational team of astronauts heads to Venus, but finds a world destroyed by nuclear war.

programme.title: MST3K: Teenagers From Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of aliens land on Earth and decide to use the planet as a farm for their livestock. One of the aliens rebels and flees to a small town, where he is pursued by another alien who kills anyone in his path.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch an early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital, before watching a movie made of several edited television episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: MST3K: Star Force: Fugitive Alien II
programme.desc: Ken and the crew of the Bacchus 3 return in Star Force: Fugitive Alien II (1987) while Joel and the Bots make a Captain Joe action figure and stage a "name that puppet" quiz show.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: It's Heaven vs. Hell in this short. Plus: bread?

programme.title: MST3K: Being From Another Planet
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch a re-edited version of Time Walker (1982) called "Being From Another Planet" in which a mummy awakened by a university team goes on a killing spree.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Brandon throws a big pool party, Justin sends Audrina mixed signals, and tempers flare when Spencer and Brody reveal their issues with each other.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Brody opens up about his fractured relationships, Heidi and Spencer's business turns personal, and Audrina confronts Justin after he denies kissing her.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Brody tries to protect his house as wildfires tear through Malibu, and Justin is caught in the middle when Audrina and Stephanie address rumors during a trip to Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Jason opens up about his relapse, Audrina reconnects with her ex Ryan Cabrera, Spencer plans an anniversary surprise for Heidi, and Kaitlynn hosts a black-tie gala.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Brody and Kaitlynn are at odds on having kids, Brandon is reluctant to define his relationship, and Audrina and Stephanie's beef boils over at Heidi's bachelorette party.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings

programme.title: Laguna Beach

programme.title: Laguna Beach

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Briana reconsiders her decision to file an order of protection against Devoin. Mackenzie wants Josh to move in with her family, and Alex struggles to trust Matt. Joey has an unexpected question to ask Katie.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Katie and Joey clash over finances, and Briana lets Devoin babysit Nova for the first time. Alex and Matt work on their relationship while Mackenzie goes behind her mom's back and gets on birth control.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Mackenzie and Josh go to prom, and Briana is overwhelmed with baby expenses. Katie and Joey decide to go to counseling, and Alex finds out that Matt has been talking to another girl.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Briana's sister Brittney goes on a road trip, leaving Briana behind, and Alex and Matt attempt to work on their issues. Mackenzie and Josh go to the first rodeo of the season. Against Joey's wishes Katie models in a fashion show.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Briana makes a decision about Devoin's role in her daughter's life. Katie is suspicious of Joey's extracurricular activities. Alex pushes Matt away for good. Mackenzie tries to support Josh as he competes at his first rodeo.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Briana finally faces Devoin in court. Katie urges Joey to consider a new job offer. Mackenzie struggles with Josh when he puts rodeo before her, and Alex is shocked when Matt rejects a life-changing offer.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Tension rises between the sisters when Briana starts college. Katie struggles to accept Joey's graveyard shift attitude. Alex decides to go to prom, and Mackenzie and Josh are barely communicating on Father's Day.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Briana decides to get on birth control, and Alex accuses her mom of losing prized possessions. Katie's birthday turns into a disaster, and Mackenzie discovers that Josh has been lying to her for a long time.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Briana celebrates her birthday behind her mom's back, and Alex starts dating a new guy. Mackenzie goes on a camping trip to forget about Josh, while Katie and Joey's relationship reaches a breaking point.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Mackenzie is heartbroken about Josh but decides not to chase after him. Briana wants to start dating but her mom is extremely against it. Alex goes out for the first time since having Arabella, and Katie is stunned at how quickly Joey has moved on.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Briana pursues a secret relationship, while Alex invites Matt to celebrate Arabella's first birthday. Katie lets Joey take care of Molli for the weekend, and Mackenzie and her parents don't see eye-to-eye.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Katie wants to celebrate Molli's first birthday with Joey, while Briana surprisingly reaches out to Devoin. Alex tries to co-parent with Matt, and Mackenzie and Josh disagree on what it means to be a family.

programme.title: Teen Mom 3
programme.desc: Katie offers a big shocker about the current status of her relationship with Joey and things heat up when he faces her mom on stage. Meanwhile, things get explosive when Briana confronts Devoin about his role as Nova's father.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: From laughing at their kids' tantrums to sympathizing with parental struggles, our Teen Mom OG and Teen Mom 2 moms unleash their personal opinions on the biggest moments from a recent season Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta del verano comienza para nuestros shores en la isla paradisiaca de Mykonos donde se desatan las primeras pasiones entre shots y diversión pura

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera madrugada en Mykonos es muy agitada para nuestros shores, sobre todo para Mane, Esteban, Fernando y una invitada española

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shores comienzan el día paseo en barco donde las mexicanas dejan claro la antipatía hacia la millonaria italiana. Tras un regreso, los chicos disfrutan en un club de playa de una tarde de sol y bellezas

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Comienza la despedida de Mykonos por todo lo alto. Primera parada en un club de playa donde Elettra demuestra a Abraham que es algo posesiva. Tras una cena típica griega, bailes incluidos, terminan la noche de Mykonos en una discoteca

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Después de una intensa mañana de trabajo en el gimnasio, Arantxa comunica a sus amigos que lo está pasando mal en su relación con Igor. El resto del día lo pasan conociendo Madrid, paseando y en un bus turístico

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Abraham decide confesar a sus compañeros el romance entre Arantxa y Fernando. El grupo se divide para pasar la tarde en el gimnasio y en la peluquería. Luego en la casa, Arantxa vive un momento muy intenso

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa después de la disco Arantxa se enfrenta intensamente a Elettra mientras Abraham se enfada mucho con Mane porque cree que esta se ríe de su amiga española

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuestros Shores siguen conociendo Madrid. Tras unos momentos picantes durante una típica siesta española, dan un paseo por el centro de la capital.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: D.A. Julie March refuses to back away from a closed case in which her prime murder suspect commits suicide and, after his death, allegedly disposes of a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds no shortage of shady characters when scandal and murder rocks the training camp of boxer Billy Leon just before the biggest match of his career.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock reluctantly becomes an angel for a Broadway-bound musical about lawyers when the playwright Sam Spelvin is accused of murdering an acerbic theater critic.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After achieving success in her younger years, brilliant septuagenarian Madeline Matlock uses her unassuming demeanor to make her way into a position at a prestigious law firm, Jacobson Moore.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has an unusual problem defending a young married couple accused of murdering the woman who gave birth to a baby they were prepared to adopt.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: It’s good news/bad news for Ben Matlock on the day he will be honored as Atlanta’s Man of the Year.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: An arsonist is about to torch Matlock’s favorite men’s store and one of the owners will become Matlock’s next case after his partner is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Misplaced loyalties make Jonathan Duvall the prime suspect for robbery and murder when he attempts to right alleged wrongs against his mentor.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s client is accused of killing his ambulance-chasing lawyer who specializes in cases of personal injury – especially when the injuries occur at a local amusement park.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After achieving success in her younger years, brilliant septuagenarian Madeline Matlock uses her unassuming demeanor to make her way into a position at a prestigious law firm, Jacobson Moore.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock flies out to Hollywood to defend a beautiful former actress, Catherine Welden, who formed a lucrative cosmetic business only to be accused of murdering an ex-lover who was blackmailing her.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: Sister Bond
programme.desc: Kendra Herrin and her sister, Maliyah, were born attached at the abdomen and pelvis; doctors use a groundbreaking surgical procedure to separate the girls.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: After Separation
programme.desc: Stories of three very different sets of twins incorporate their lives since being surgically separated.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Follows Maria and Teresa Tapia, conjoined twins from the Dominican Republic, as they travel to Richmond, Virginia to undergo separation surgery.

programme.title: Growing Up Tiny: Kenadie's Story
programme.desc: Kenadie, now age 6, is 30-inches tall and weighs 14 pounds, which defies doctors' expectations of her survival.

programme.title: Growing Up Tiny: Kenadie's Next Chapter
programme.desc: Seven-year-old primordial dwarf Kenadie struggles to confront the possibility of early puberty and her terrifying fear of Halloween costumes.

programme.title: Help! I'm Turning Into a Giant
programme.desc: A woman, 31, has a very rare condition causing her to grow uncontrollably, transforming her from an average teenager into a 6-foot-6 adult, weighing 500 pounds and still getting larger.

programme.title: The Man with the 80lb Groin
programme.desc: Dan lives with a debilitating condition that caused his scrotum to begin growing uncontrollably seven years ago; Dan and his wife Mindy are desperate to find a cure.

programme.title: My Giant Face Tumor
programme.desc: Ed and Aum both suffer from a disorder that causes tumors to grow uncontrollably along nerve shafts.

programme.title: My Legs Won't Stop Growing
programme.desc: Three inspirational young women have a number of conditions that cause the lower limbs to grow or swell excessively.

programme.title: My Deadly Appetite
programme.desc: A patient with an incurable syndrome suffers bouts of hunger and aggression.

programme.title: Tiny at 20
programme.desc: Hannah, one of the world's tiniest women, is eager to gain her independence and succeed in the entertainment world.

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America who haven't finished growing.

programme.title: The Tiniest Girl in the World
programme.desc: The family of a 2-year-old tries to get a diagnosis of her condition, which may be a rare form of primordial dwarfism, in order to plan for her future.

programme.title: Real Life Hulks
programme.desc: These men do anything to enlarge their muscles in their quest to take on huge proportions, including injecting oil into their muscles to inflate them.

programme.title: My Baby's Head Keeps Growing

programme.title: World's Tallest Man: Still Growing
programme.desc: Follow Sultan Kosen of Turkey as he continues his journey as the world's tallest man.

programme.title: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti
programme.desc: At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, 26-year-old Jyoti Amge is the smallest woman in the world; Jyoti is in the United States for work and to explore American culture, but she also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's new sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins, "Poldark") arrives on the day after the murder of a local shrew occurs, and he is immediately put to work.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Long-suppressed family secrets, stolen artifacts and a thirty-year-old death at a Celtic burial site result in a series of murders in present-day Midsomer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Midsomer hosts its 12th Annual Literary Festival, an author is found with his neck broken. More writers will die before the winner of the competition is announced.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer Worthy's beloved local pub figures in a case involving unrequited love, secret business deals, and passionate affairs.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer comes closer to its boiling point when a priest is burned to death inside the effigy of a straw woman and more people burst into flames spontaneously, as though by witchcraft.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Nine years after Ferdy Villers killed himself, his family reunites for Christmas, unaware that someone is out for revenge.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Undertaker Patrick Pennyman is found dead with his wrists slashed and suspicion turns towards a spiritualist church.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: James works with Madison Hildebrand to find a home in Malibu for a British millionaire who has a fear of heights; Josh Flagg struggles to move on after losing his grandmother, Edith; Josh Altman and the Brits engage in an epic negotiation session.

programme.desc: Fredrik lands a building with $400 million dollars in potential sales, but his boss thinks he may have over-promised in order to get it; Ryan juggles two sellers; Steve gets a list of demands from a broker and makes one of his own.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When Ryan lands a $25 million dollar listing in Tribeca, he calls upon his most intense team member for help; in Chelsea, Steve's listing for his friend, Sam, continues to have problems, but it's nothing compared to his dating life.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When a seller demands Ryan remove his team member from a $25 million Tribeca listing, he hatches a plan that includes a secret twist; Steve lands an opportunity to sell an amazing $18 million SoHo penthouse; Fredrik and Ryan reconnect with Luis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik begins questioning the effects of gentrification as he sells his $225 million development in the historic East Village; Ryan starts to doubt his sales strategy; Steve's co-lister tests his patience, nerves and even his bicycling skills.

programme.desc: Still sore, David keeps James out of a deal with a mystery client; Josh Flagg tries to unload a teardown property; Josh Altman strives to win over a new client while enduring pressure from his visiting parents to have children.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Flagg gets creative when marketing a $20 million listing in Trousdale Estates; James and David finally gain access to the Beachwood party pad; Josh Altman is determined to sell a house designed by architect Wallace Neff to the right buyer.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James' family commitments get in the way of a listing with a demanding client; Josh Altman strives to increase the value of an overpriced estate; when Josh Flagg and the Brits join forces, Josh Altman seizes on a chance to get his revenge.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman's prank on Josh Flagg leads to a confrontation that turns personal; James pulls off a sentimental surprise for his wife on their 5-year anniversary; Josh Altman confesses to a change of heart in regards to his future with Heather.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James works with Madison Hildebrand to find a home in Malibu for a British millionaire who has a fear of heights; Josh Flagg struggles to move on after losing his grandmother, Edith; Josh Altman and the Brits engage in an epic negotiation session.

programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays with different-sized cardboard tubes. Lady Aberlin is observing how neighbors react to the laughter box. Dr. Maggie Kimmel tells the story of “Button Broth.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of how people make toothbrushes. Lady Aberlin observes the neighbors' reactions after she can turn herself into a tiger. Princess Zelda arrives in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.desc: Harriett Cow shares the plans for a play. Lady Aberlin is greeted by a ballet dancer who dances her around the Neighborhood. The dancer inspires Ana Platypus to be a ballerina in the school play.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Abril James siempre había soñado con renovar una casa victoriana. Cuando ella y su prometido Matt compran una casa histórica en Salt Lake City, estado de Utah.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La familia Fahey ha vivido en la misma casa en la ciudad de Galway, Irlanda, durante más de treinta años. Martha Fahey creció allí y ahora se prepara para criar a su hija en el mismo ambiente, con la ayuda de sus padres.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La infancia debería ser una etapa de descubrimiento lúdico y de regocijo inocente. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando las realidades del reino paranormal traspasan sus barreras y despiertan el mal verdadero?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fe es una fuerza poderosa. Puede proporcionar fuerza a los débiles, puede calmar los mares más tempestuosos. Pero, para la mayoría de las personas, la fe brinda respuestas que pueden ayudar a darle sentido a un mundo caótico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los nuevos comienzos son siempre emocionantes. Pero sin importar cuánto deseemos que ocurran, siempre llegan con cierto grado de ansiedad y dificultad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat
programme.desc: En las tierras altas, cerca de las montañas nevadas de Australia, se encuentra una gran área boscosa, conocida como Wombat Wood. Salpicadas entre el denso follaje están las aberturas visibles de más de 100 madrigueras donde duermen los wombats.

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat: La jornada de un joey
programme.desc: Los wombats suelen ser criaturas solitarias' y de movimiento lento', pero la cría de wombat es un momento de cambio, que genera energía, agresión y mucho juego.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Eche una nueva mirada a Nueva Caledonia. Experimente el estilo de vida local, visite una laguna increíble y encuentre paisajes asombrosos en cada esquina.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Israel ha sido una encrucijada para principales civilizaciones, religiones y corrientes comerciales y culturales que han nutrido los mundos europeo, árabe y asiático a lo largo del tiempo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony viaja a la capital del cinturón de cereales de Minneapolis, Minnesota, para experimentar de primera mano el conflicto entre los operadores creativos independientes y las franquicias genéricas.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Situado en Awash National Park, aquí seguimos la vida de un clan de babuinos Hamadryas.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Dos de los carnívoros más poderosos de África impactan uno con otro en la sabana. Leones y hienas deben matar casi todos los días para mantener a grandes familias.

programme.title: La vida secreta del diablo de Tasmania
programme.desc: En este episodio nos encontramos con una serie de demonios de Tasmania que forman parte de una población que es monitoreada por conservacionistas. Carlos, de dos años, es uno de ellos. Seguimos sus búsquedas de comida, dominio sobre los otros

programme.title: La vida secreta del diablo de Tasmania
programme.desc: Aunque a los demonios de Tasmania les gusta su parte justa de las peleas, también son padres comprometidos que son heroicos en la defensa de sus crías criadas en bolsas. Este episodio aborda las batallas de la temporada de apareamiento

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat
programme.desc: En las tierras altas, cerca de las montañas nevadas de Australia, se encuentra una gran área boscosa, conocida como Wombat Wood. Salpicadas entre el denso follaje están las aberturas visibles de más de 100 madrigueras donde duermen los wombats.

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat: La jornada de un joey
programme.desc: Los wombats suelen ser criaturas solitarias' y de movimiento lento', pero la cría de wombat es un momento de cambio, que genera energía, agresión y mucho juego.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Sancho se mete en problemas, por lo que Sergio intenta adiestrarlo para convertirlo en una mascota modélica. Preocupado de que Lori se haya enamorado, Bobbi visita a Lori en la universidad y trata de impresionarla con su habilidad jugando al golf.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los Casagrande preparan a Lalo para la audición en la que quiere ser elegido el nuevo compañero canino de Phoebe Powers. Con los adultos fuera, Bobby y Carlota se turnan para cuidar a los niños e ir a una fiesta.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Carl necesita obtener la aprobación de un grupo musical antes de que su nueva canción pueda sonar en la radio. Ronnie Anne y sus amigas luchan por el espacio del gimnasio jugando al balón prisionero.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Después de ver los impresionantes movimientos de giro de CJ, Par ayuda a CJ a entrenar para una competencia. Cuando Adelaide pierde un diente, Carl y Bobby le enseñan sobre el Ratón, el hada de los dientes de América Latina.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid sospechan que el nuevo vecino del edificio es, en realidad, La Tormenta, su luchador favorito. Un anciano gana el kart con el que Carl soñaba, pero él está dispuesto a demostrarle que lo merece más que nadie.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
